title: HARMONIZED IUPAC GUIDELINES FOR SINGLE-LABORATORY VALIDATION OF METHODS OF ANALYSIS

sections.section: HARMONIZED IUPAC GUIDELINES FOR SINGLE-LABORATORY VALIDATION OF METHODS OF ANALYSIS
sections.summary: Notes that Codex CAC/GL 49-2003 adopts the Harmonized IUPAC Guidelines for Single‑Laboratory Validation of Methods of Analysis, with a specific Codex note that the Guidelines’ definitions apply only for the purpose of those Guidelines and are not general Codex definitions, and cites the original IUPAC reference.
